description:
'''Blog rock''' (also known as '''blog indie''') is a loosely defined style and era of [[indie rock]] that originally emerged from the [[Old Internet|online]] musical [[blogosphere]] in the mid-to late 2000s. Similarly to other early [[blog]]-related music scenes such as [[bloghouse]] and [[blog rap]]. The term was used to describe bands who garnered attention primarily through music blogs and online spaces, independent of formal music industry structures.

Notable acts include [[Clap Your Hands Say Yeah]], [[Voxtrot]], [[Cold War Kids]], [[Cults (band)|Cults]], [[Tokyo Police Club]], [[Black Kids]], [[Black Moth Super Rainbow]], [[Cymbals Eat Guitars]], [[Sunset Rubdown]], [[Islands (band)|Islands]], [[Fang Island]], [[Anathallo]], [[Tapes 'n Tapes]], [[The Rural Alberta Advantage]], [[Menomena]], [[Ra Ra Riot]], [[Beirut (band)|Beirut]], [[The Dodos]], [[The Go! Team]], [[Sleigh Bells (band)|Sleigh Bells]], [[Los Campesinos!]], and [[Peter Bjorn and John]].
